name: halal-scanner
description: A React application that uses Gemini AI to scan food ingredients and determine if they are Halal, Haram, or Doubtful.

scripts.setup-android: npx cap telemetry off && (npx cap add android || echo 'Android platform already exists')
scripts.refresh-android: npm run build && npm run clean-native && npm run setup-android && npx cap sync && npm run ensure-vars && npm run fix-gradle && npm run force-java && npm run set-icon
scripts.build-apk: npm run get-sha1 && npm run build && npm run clean-native && npm run setup-android && npx cap sync && npm run ensure-vars && npm run fix-gradle && npm run force-java && npm run set-icon && node update-manifest.js && node scripts/smart-build.js debug
scripts.build-release-apk: npm run build && npm run clean-native && npm run setup-android && npx cap sync && npm run create-release-key && npm run ensure-vars && npm run fix-gradle && npm run force-java && npm run set-icon && node update-manifest.js && node scripts/smart-build.js both
scripts.build-aab: npm run build && npm run clean-native && npm run setup-android && npx cap sync && npm run create-release-key && npm run ensure-vars && npm run fix-gradle && npm run force-java && npm run set-icon && node update-manifest.js && node scripts/smart-build.js bundle
scripts.build-all: npm run build && npm run clean-native && npm run setup-android && npx cap sync && npm run create-release-key && npm run ensure-vars && npm run fix-gradle && npm run force-java && npm run set-icon && node update-manifest.js && node scripts/smart-build.js both
